name: 0ktapus
description: 0ktapus is a large-scale phishing and SaaS identity theft campaign focused on stealing credentials and MFA tokens from organizations using Okta, Microsoft 365, and other cloud identity platforms. Rather than relying on malware-heavy intrusion methods, the operators use highly convincing phishing ...
strategic_objectives: Credential theft for privileged SaaS and cloud access
Bypass MFA through session token capture and proxy phishing
Business email compromise and executive impersonation
